items.title: Buzzr — real-time AI quiz platform
items.description: Build a quiz your way — write each question by hand, or let AI draft the whole set from a single prompt. Host it live and the leaderboard reshuffles the moment someone buzzes in.

highlights.text: manually or with an AI prompt
Live play & scoring over Socket.IO, held
Google OAuth; Postgres + Prisma backend on AWS EC2

items.title: Tweeter — full-stack social platform
items.description: A Twitter-style social app with OAuth, customizable profiles, tweets, and real-time chat over WebSockets — designed and built across the full stack.

highlights.text: Google OAuth + email sign-in and a following graph
React/Redux front end, Node + Express + MongoDB API

items.title: Scrolls — national paper-submission platform
items.description: A national-level platform for technical paper submissions — the official registration and submission portal for AKGEC's national paper presentation, used by real students under real deadlines.

highlights.text: reCAPTCHA v3 to keep bots and spam out

items.title: Edumate — school management ERP
items.description: A school management ERP with three role-based panels — admin, faculty, and students — each behind its own login, sharing the data that runs a campus day to day.

highlights.text: Attendance, events, updates, and feedback in one place
